about.title: Surf Camp Taghazout Morocco
about.description: Chillout Surf Camp Taghazout has a friendly team with over 15 years of experience in surf travel. Our qualified and experienced surf instructors provide surf lessons and surf guiding for all surf levels including beginners, intermediate and advanced surfers.
about.customizable: We offer customizable packages for individuals, couples, groups, and families.

packages.title: Choose the suitable offer
packages.readyText: Ready for the waves? Secure your spot today.

3-days-all-inclusive.name: 3 Days All Inclusive
3-days-all-inclusive.description: A quick taste of the surf life in Taghazout Bay. Includes accommodation, all meals, daily surf lessons, and equipment rental to get you started in just a few days.

5-days-all-inclusive.name: 5 Days All Inclusive
5-days-all-inclusive.description: A shorter version of our bestseller surf camp Taghazout package. Perfect for a quick getaway with surf lessons, equipment rental, full board meals, and a visit to the Agadir Souk.
includes: Airport/bus station pickup or drop-off in Agadir
Wetsuit and surfboard rental + unlimited equipment
Panoramic terrace, free WiFi, swimming pool

7-days-all-inclusive.name: 7 Days All Inclusive
7-days-all-inclusive.description: The ultimate surf experience at our surf camp Taghazout. Includes daily surf lessons, full board meals, airport transfer, yoga, and excursions to Paradise Valley and the Souk.
includes: Airport/station transfer (pickup or drop-off from Agadir)
All meals: breakfast, lunch, dinner daily
Wetsuit and board rental for the week
2 yoga sessions per week (60 min each)
Excursions to Paradise Valley and argan oil village

surf-and-stay.name: Surf & Stay
surf-and-stay.description: Freedom to explore at our Taghazout surf camp. Accommodation with full board meals and equipment rental included. Lessons aren't included, giving you flexibility to surf at your own pace.

classic.name: Classic Surf Package
classic.description: Balance of comfort and surfing at our surf camp Taghazout. Includes spot transfers, equipment rental, and full board. Perfect for independent surfers who just need logistics handled.
includes: Agadir Airport/Bus Station Pick Up OR Drop Off

premium.name: Premium Surf Package
premium.description: The full experience. Includes ATV Quad Biking, Imsouane surf trip, extra yoga sessions, sandboarding, and everything you need for an unforgettable week in Morocco.
includes: All meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner daily + BBQ night)
5 yoga sessions per week (1 hour each)
Paradise Valley and Argan Oil Village visits
Agadir City and traditional market tours

ultimate.name: Ultimate Surf Package
ultimate.description: The best of everything at our surf camp Taghazout. Trips to Agadir & Essaouira, Imsouane, beach bonfire, lessons, yoga, and full board accommodation in one massive package.
includes: Agadir city and traditional market visit

family.name: Family Surf Package
family.description: Designed for families visiting our surf camp Taghazout. Includes full board, private surf lessons, excursions to Paradise Valley, and a special BBQ night.
includes: 2 yoga sessions per week (1 hour each)
Paradise Valley and Argan Oil Village
Agadir City and traditional market visits

customPackage.title: Custom Package
customPackage.description: If you need any help or want to create your own Morocco surf holiday package, just drop us a line and we would be delighted to help you plan. Whether you are travelling solo, with friends, in a big group or with your partner and family, we can customise a special surf camp Taghazout experience for you. Just Say Aloha! 🙂

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you plan your perfect trip.

form.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.description: Experience the best surf in Morocco with our expert guides and comfortable accommodation. We make your holiday unforgettable.

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience.
